sentences.arabic: تَمْتَلِكُ الْمُوسِيقَى الْعَرَبِيَّةُ تَارِيخًا طَوِيلًا وَأَدَوَاتٍ فَرِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: Arapska muzika ima dugu historiju i jedinstvene instrumente.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic music has a long history and unique instruments.

sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْعُودُ مَلِكَ الْآلَاتِ الْمُوسِيقِيَّةِ فِي الشَّرْقِ.
sentences.translation: Oud se smatra kraljem muzičkih instrumenata na Istoku.
sentences.translationEn: The oud is considered the king of musical instruments in the East.

sentences.arabic: يَعْزِفُ الْفَنَّانُ عَلَى أَوْتَارِهِ أَلْحَانًا حَزِينَةً أَوْ سَعِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: Umjetnik svira tužne ili vesele melodije na njegovim žicama.
sentences.translationEn: The artist plays sad or happy melodies on its strings.

sentences.arabic: تُسْتَخْدَمُ هَذِهِ الْآلَةُ فِي الْحَفَلَاتِ الْعَامَّةِ وَالْمُنَاسَبَاتِ الْخَاصَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj instrument se koristi na javnim koncertima i privatnim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: This instrument is used in public concerts and private occasions.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَمْتِعُ النَّاسُ بِسَمَاعِ صَوْتِ الْعُودِ لِأَنَّهُ يَلْمِسُ الْقَلْبَ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi uživaju slušajući zvuk ouda jer dotiče srce.
sentences.translationEn: People enjoy listening to the sound of the oud because it touches the heart.
